Login.adminDescription: Sign in with your tenant administrator account to manage your loyalty program.
Login.apiKeyDescription: Paste your tenant API key to unlock the developer portal.
Login.organizationHelp: Your account has access to several organizations. Choose the one to sign in to, then submit again.

Rules.title: Bonification Rules
Rules.description: Configure rules to automatically credit loyalty points to member wallets based on transaction amounts and inactivity criteria.
Rules.alwaysCreditLabel: Always credit points (even when using points)
Rules.noRules: No rules available at the moment.
Rules.confirmDeleteText: Are you sure you want to delete the rule "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

Establishment.title: Establishment Context
Establishment.description: Configure Tenant variables and Tier Policy definitions.
Establishment.tenantPreferencesDesc: Global settings applied to all rules for this API key.
Establishment.autoAssigned: Auto-assigned context based on authenticated API Key.

Wallet.title: Wallet Policy Configuration
Wallet.description: Define global limits, virtual currency properties, and KYC constraints for all member wallets.
Wallet.otpDesc: Any debit above this requires SMS/Email OTP.

Members.title: Members Directory
Members.description: View member wallets, balances, and perform manual adjustments.
Members.name: Name

MemberDetail.title: Wallet Management
MemberDetail.referralLinkDesc: Share this link with others to earn loyalty points.
MemberDetail.noReferralsYet: No members registered using this link yet.

Logs.title: Event Logs
Logs.description: Real-time stream of incoming events and their resulting rule engine evaluations.

RulesNew.title: Create New Rule
RulesNew.description: Define a new automated loyalty rule for your establishment.
RulesNew.ruleDescriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this rule does...

Dashboard.title: Program Overview
Dashboard.description: Real-time key performance indicators, active members distribution, and recent campaign activity.
Dashboard.heroSubtitle: Here is what's happening with your loyalty campaign today. Your user engagement is active and healthy.
Dashboard.activitySubtitle: Real-time logs of wallet creations, transactions, and referrals.
Dashboard.healthCheckSubtitle: Current status of rule engine and database connections.

Developer.tokenGateDescription: Enter your tenant API key to manage webhooks, view delivery logs and try the sandbox.
Developer.dashboardDescription: Overview of your integration: API keys, webhooks and recent activity.
Developer.apiKeysDescription: Create and manage the keys your systems use to authenticate against this API (X-Api-Key header).
Developer.myApiKeysDescription: Create and manage the keys your apps use to authenticate against this API (X-Api-Key header). Only keys you created are shown here.
Developer.inviteDeveloperDescription: Create a developer account on this tenant. They'll receive an email to set their password.
Developer.inviteSuccess: Invitation sent to {email}. They'll receive an email to set their password.
Developer.adminOnlyNotice: Only tenant admins can invite developers.
Developer.webhooksDescription: Register callback URLs to receive real-time notifications when events happen in this loyalty program.
Developer.logsDescription: History of webhook delivery attempts across all your endpoints.
Developer.docsDescription: How to authenticate, subscribe to events, and verify webhook signatures.
Developer.sandboxDescription: Use a TEST-mode API key to safely try out the API and your webhook integration.
Developer.applicationsDescription: Create an application for each third-party project that integrates this loyalty program: you get a public key (identifier), a private key (authentication) and an optional signed callback.
Developer.appsCallbackHint: Optional. If provided, a signed webhook endpoint is created and its secret is shown once.
Developer.appsRevealWarning: Copy these keys now — they won't be shown again.
Developer.appsEmpty: No applications yet. Create one to get your integration keys.
Developer.appsRotateKeyConfirm: Generate a new private key? The current key will be revoked immediately.
Developer.appsRotateSecretConfirm: Generate a new webhook secret? Update your servers with the new secret.
Developer.appsDeleteConfirm: Delete this application? Its private key will be revoked and its webhook removed.

Landing.heroTitle: Rewarding, managing and engaging your customers has never been easier.
Landing.heroDescription: Loyalty Engine aggregates digital reward tools to allow businesses to engage users, manage points wallets, and accept redemptions seamlessly on their website and mobile app.
Landing.solutionApiDesc: Accept point redemptions and automatically award points on your website or app through a single interface.
Landing.solutionRewardsDesc: For welcoming a new customer, celebrating an anniversary, or completing a purchase, our engine automatically credits your users.
Landing.solutionWalletDesc: Allow your users to check their balance, transfer points to peers, and spend their rewards in your ecosystem.
Landing.walletSectionDesc: Loyalty Engine combines the best of a digital wallet to allow you to:
Landing.stepsTitle: Simplify your loyalty programs in 3 steps with Loyalty Engine
Landing.step1Desc: Set up your point values, triggers, and reward rules. It's fully customizable and secure.
Landing.step2Desc: Invite your customers to participate and track their engagement directly on your dashboard.
Landing.step3Desc: Watch your customers redeem their points seamlessly across your ecosystem.
Landing.apiSectionDesc: The Loyalty Engine Merchant API is the simplest and most secure way to effortlessly integrate rewards on your websites and mobile applications.
Landing.apiSectionSub: The advantages of the Loyalty Engine API:
Landing.apiFeature3: Traceability of all incoming and outgoing points
Landing.apiFeature4: Intuitive dashboards for better tracking and decision making
Landing.readyDesc: Open an account and start engaging your users today. Whether alone or as a team, be certain that Loyalty Engine provides you with the tools needed to manage rights and access levels.
Landing.footerDesc: Loyalty Engine is a digital reward platform providing businesses with a comprehensive set of multichannel digital solutions to facilitate loyalty engagement.
Landing.footerSol1Desc: To integrate rewards directly into your platforms.
Landing.footerSol2Desc: To automatically credit points on events.
Landing.footerSol3Desc: To allow users to manage their balances and redemptions.

Register.title: Create your account
Register.usernameHint: Only letters a-z A-Z, numbers 0-9, dot . and underscore _ are allowed
Register.acceptTerms: I accept the terms of service and privacy policy of Loyalty Engine.
Register.loginInstead: Already have an account? Login here
Register.checkEmailMessage: Check your inbox ({email}) to confirm your address before signing in.
